source: dps.psx.com.pk (market-watch DOM + OHLC historical feed); Dawn/BR RSS for macro

index.note: Sharp REVERSAL day. Opened near ATH, tagged fresh intraday ATH 182,185.87, then sold off to 177,836 low and closed -1.36%. Trigger = US-Iran Geneva talks POSTPONED -> peace-trade unwind/risk-off after a 4-day melt-up. Breadth heavily negative.

announcements.text: Form-29: Mr. Shoaib Siddiqui (son of Non-Exec Director Irfan Siddiqui) GIFTED 50,000 ordinary shares to family — mother Dr. Ghazala (20,000), sister Rabia (10,000), sister Safia (10,000), sister Maryam (10,000). Intra-family GIFT, NOT an open-market sale.
announcements.note: Attachment OPENED + OCR'd per Prime Directive. No shares hit market; routine family estate transfer; MEBL thesis unaffected.

announcements.text: Board approved Revenue Forecast & Capital Budget for FY2026-27 (meeting 19-Jun 11:30AM). No financial figures disclosed.
announcements.note: Not held. Routine governance. Attachment opened + OCR'd.

commodities.source: brecorder RSS (Brent $78.31 -0.68%, set for -8% week as Hormuz supply flows); USD/PKR 278.25 (+Re0.01)

macro_news.headline: PSX tumbles over 1,800 points intraday as US-Iran Geneva talks postponed
macro_news.note: Peace-trade unwind reverses the 4-day melt-up; risk-off. Drove the -1.36% close from intraday ATH.

macro_news.headline: Oil falls as supply starts moving through Strait of Hormuz; Brent $78.31 (-0.68%), set for -8% week
macro_news.note: Weak/falling oil persists -> R-EXP-003 relative E&P drag watch live. Brent well under $80.

macro_news.headline: Outflow of profit beats FDI by 32% (profit repatriation $2.154bn 11MFY26)
macro_news.note: Structural risk-off undertone; weak foreign appeal.

macro_news.headline: SBP FX reserves up $6mn to $17.221bn (as of Jun 12)
Senate adopts 123 budget recommendations for FY2026-27 (income-tax threshold up, luxury taxes)
macro_news.note: Advisory only; National Assembly Finance Bill passage still due ~06-30 = R-004 binary watch.
